title: user — settings
description: Tenant-scoped policy for user provisioning + profile + privacy + retention. Compliance floors clamp every value — tenants may only TIGHTEN, never loosen. Two per-user settings groups too.

groups.label: Users
groups.description: Tenant-wide policy for user provisioning + lifecycle.

sections.label: Registration
sections.description: Who can create new users, and under what conditions.

fields.name: self_registration_enabled
fields.label: Allow self-registration
fields.helpText: When on, anyone with the invitation-free sign-up URL can create an account.

fields.name: requires_invitation
fields.label: Require invitation
fields.helpText: Users must accept an invitation to register.

fields.name: requires_admin_approval
fields.label: Require admin approval
fields.helpText: New users land in pending status until an admin activates them.

sections.label: Profile requirements
sections.description: Which fields are mandatory on a new profile.

fields.name: max_avatar_size_kb
fields.label: Maximum profile picture size (KB)
fields.helpText: Upper bound. Per-tier cap clamps this down.

sections.label: Privacy + retention
sections.description: Minor visibility + erasure timelines. Compliance floors may tighten these values automatically.

fields.name: minor_data_visibility
fields.label: Who sees minor profile PII

options.any_authenticated: Any authenticated caller in the tenant

fields.helpText: COPPA + regional GDPR floors may force `guardian_only`.

fields.name: adult_transition_age
fields.label: Age of majority (years)
fields.helpText: Age at which guardianship auto-terminates + medical/financial data transfers to the athlete's own consent.

fields.name: erasure_hold_days
fields.label: Days to hold erased users before purge
fields.helpText: Soft-deleted rows survive this window — restorable during it. Compliance floor: 30 days.

fields.name: notify_profile_updated
fields.label: Confirmation email when profile is updated

fields.name: preferred_locale
fields.label: Preferred language
fields.helpText: Overrides the tenant default for this user.

fields.name: notify_added_to_tenant
fields.label: Email me when I'm added to a tenant

fields.name: notify_profile_updated
fields.label: Email me when my profile changes
fields.helpText: Recommended — helps you catch account-takeover attempts.
